enriched_points.expanded_content: Stability margins quantify the ability of a control system to withstand uncertainties, ensuring performance remains intact under varying operational conditions, as highlighted in robust control frameworks.
Performance metrics evaluate efficiency and effectiveness in dynamic responses, balancing speed and accuracy to achieve optimal robotic functionality, crucial for real-time applications.

Robustness assessment involves testing the system's resilience against disturbances, providing insights into design efficacy and adaptability in unpredictable environments, enhancing overall reliability.
